title: Qualcomm Lands Major AI Chip Supply Deal With TikTok Owner ByteDance
description: Qualcomm has secured a deal to supply artificial intelligence chips for data centers operated by ByteDance, the Chinese technology company behind TikTok.
content:
Qualcomm has secured a deal to supply artificial intelligence chips for data centers operated by ByteDance, the Chinese technology company behind TikTok, giving the U.S. chipmaker a major foothold in the rapidly expanding AI infrastructure market.

title: iOS 27 Siri Redesign Will Use Dark Color Scheme, Matching Apple's WWDC Art
description: Apple is redesigning Siri for iOS 27 to accommodate new artificial intelligence features and chatbot capabilities. Siri is getting a dedicated app, integration with the iPhone's Dynamic Island, and a new design scheme. The graphics that Apple is using to promote WWDC hint at its design plans for Siri, according to Bloomberg's Mark Gurman.
content:
Apple is redesigning Siri for iOS 27 to accommodate new artificial intelligence features and chatbot capabilities. ‌Siri‌ is getting a dedicated app, integration with the iPhone's Dynamic Island, and a new design scheme.

title: Challenges of AI data center growth
description: The growth of artificial intelligence technologies in the United States has resulted in a significant rise in domestic AI data centers and their accompanying power demands.
content: The growth of artificial intelligence technologies in the United States has led to an exponential increase in the number of domestic AI data centers and their associated electrical power demand. According to research by TRG Datacenters, the United St... [3599 chars]

title: Vance Calls Pope Leo's AI Warning Profound
description: Vice President JD Vance praised Pope Leo XIV's first encyclical on artificial intelligence as very profound, embracing the pontiff's warning that rapidly advancing technology must be guided by moral and ethical principles as debate intensifies worldwide over ...
content: Vice President JD Vance on Tuesday praised Pope Leo XIV's first encyclical on artificial intelligence as "very profound," embracing the pontiff's warning that rapidly advancing technology must be guided by moral and ethical principles as debate inten... [3138 chars]

title: Interior Chief Hits Pope Leo for 'Editorializing' AI
description: In a sharp response to a document the Vatican released Monday, Interior Secretary Doug Burgum on Tuesday brushed aside Pope Leo XIV's first encyclical and warning about artificial intelligence.
content: Interior Secretary Doug Burgum on Tuesday brushed aside Pope Leo XIV's first encyclical and warning about artificial intelligence, telling Fox Business that "tech editorializing" was not part of the papal role, a sharp response to a document the Vati... [2723 chars]

title: What Pope Leo XIV’s First Encyclical Says About the Power of AI
description: In “Magnifica Humanitas,” the pope places artificial intelligence in our daily lives, and decries the concentration of technological power in a few global players.
content: An algorithm decides what we see, another filters what we read, and still others enter into the processes that govern work, information, and collective choices. In the encyclical Magnifica Humanitas. the first signed by Pope Leo XIV and published on ... [6935 chars]

title: New AI tools identify potential drugs for rare Ebola virus
description: Recent advances in artificial intelligence have enabled Southwest Research Institute (SwRI) to identify nearly two dozen antiviral compounds that could potentially treat a rare species of Ebola virus (Bundibugyo virus) currently affecting the Democratic Republic of Congo.
content: Recent advances in artificial intelligence have enabled Southwest Research Institute (SwRI) to identify nearly two dozen antiviral compounds that could potentially treat a rare species of Ebola virus (Bundibugyo virus) currently affecting the Democra... [1548 chars]

title: Micron Leads Tech as Nasdaq Hits High: Stock Market Today
description: Investors, traders and speculators emerged from a three-day weekend optimistic about the long-term impact of artificial intelligence.
content: Two of the three main equity indexes traded in record territory Tuesday as Wall Street returned from a three-day weekend, and markets looked beyond continuing uncertainty in the Middle East. Apple (AAPL, -0.2%) hit a new high on optimism about its ar... [4329 chars]

title: Texas company plans $3.6 billion AI factory in Alexandria
description: Applied Digital is investing $3.6 billion to build Delta Forge 1, a cutting-edge artificial intelligence factory near Alexandria, Louisiana, which will create 200 full-time jobs and 1,000 construction jobs, boosting local economic growth and advancing digital infrastructure.
content:
A Texas company announced plans to build $3.6 billion data center near Alexandria that will employ 200 full-time workers.

title: ‘In the Age of Artificial Intelligence, We Are Nurturing Absolute Intelligence’: Gurudev Sri Sri Ravi Shankar at Massive Art of Living Intuition Event in Bengaluru
description: The Art of Living's Intuition Fest Creates a Landmark Moment in Human Potential; 11,000 children and parents assemble for the historic Intuition Fest; including 50 who have recieved national and international accolades
